settings.heading: What's Included
settings.content:
• Official Title Documents confirming ownership and any rights, covenants, or restrictions.
  • Searches such as Local Authority, Drainage & Water, and Environmental reports.
  • Special Conditions of Sale tailored to your property and your preferred terms.
  • Property Information Forms & Fixtures and Fittings List (where applicable).
  • Lease Documents for leasehold properties.
  • Planning and Building Regulation Certificates, if relevant.
  • Any additional documents your solicitor considers necessary.

settings.heading: Why Sellers Benefit
settings.content:
• Increases Buyer Confidence — Providing a full set of legal documents upfront gives bidders the certainty they need to commit to strong, competitive bidding.
  • Faster, Smoother Sale — Because buyers complete due diligence before the auction, there is far less risk of delays or complications after the hammer falls.
  • Reduces Fall-Through Risk — Serious buyers review the pack in advance, so only committed bidders take part — dramatically lowering the chance of post-auction withdrawal.
  • Strengthens Your Final Sale Price — Confident buyers bid higher. A clear, complete legal pack creates a competitive environment that often drives up the final sale price.
  • Ensures Full Legal Compliance — You meet all auction requirements by providing the necessary documents upfront, protecting you from future disputes.
  • Saves You Time & Stress — Early preparation of the pack means fewer last-minute issues and a smoother overall selling experience.

settings.heading: How It Works
settings.content:
• Order Online — Select the Auction Legal Pack and complete your purchase.
  • We Prepare Your Pack — Our solicitors compile all required documents, searches, and certificates.
  • Review & Approve — You review the completed pack before it goes to the auction house.
  • Ready for Auction — Your legal pack is made available to prospective bidders ahead of the auction.
